title: A Dark Legend Takes Shape
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Nami, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Rocks D. Xebec as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Our metals are reacting to something!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's gotta be Captain John's magnet-magnet power!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's causing a strong magnetic pull to the valley's Southeast Entrance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do whatever you want!! Just get outta the way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, Ganzu!! Why'd you attack John?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really think that he'd split all that loot with us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't each of those treasure chests worth at least a billion?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't blame anyone for wanting to hog it all, really...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's one of the world's overseas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It looks like a pest to me?!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
